name: Liaoning Shidai Wanheng Co.,Ltd.
summary: Liaoning Shidai Wanheng Co.,Ltd. imports and exports clothing and apparel products. The company offers its clothing products under the bee and butterfly trademarks. It is also involved in the provision of clothing processing, fabric printing and dyeing, and freight forwarding services. In addition, the company engages in the development and sale of real estate properties; and equity investment activities. The company sells its products to approximately 60 countries and regions, including Europe, the United States, Japan, and Southeast Asia. The company was formerly known as Liaoning Clothing Import and Export Company. The company was founded in 1955 and is based in Dalian, China.
